info.name: LEAD-93 v1 As-Is - All APIs
info.description: 18 existing v1 endpoints: 16 LEAD-93 Contract endpoints plus 2 supporting lookups. Read requests can be sent directly after environment setup. Write requests require enableWriteTests=true. The environment-specific gatewayPrefix is not part of the API contract.

item.name: 01 Template Queries
item.description: v1 template list and detail endpoints.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Channel list is an array', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: 02 Template Writes
item.description: Write requests are skipped unless enableWriteTests=true.

body.raw:
{
  "moduleCode": "COMMUNICATION",
  "moduleCodeName": "Communications",
  "scenarioCode": "TEMPLATE_LIBRARY",
  "emailName": "LEAD93_POSTMAN_V1",
  "description": "Temporary v1 Postman draft",
  "effectiveWay": 0,
  "effectiveFrom": null,
  "effectiveUntil": null,
  "title": "LEAD-93 v1 Postman",
  "editMode": "HTML",
  "emailContent": "MOCK_AES_CONTENT",
  "textContent": "LEAD-93 v1 Postman",
  "fileKeys": "",
  "emailContentKey": "MOCK_AES_KEY",
  "isDraft": "1",
  "version": "V1",
  "thumbnailKey": null,
  "channelMap": {},
  "isCustomBranding": "0",
  "isCampaign": 0
}

exec: console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Created template identifiers exist', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(json.data.emailCode).to.exist; pm.expect(json.data.version).to.exist; });
console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

exec: console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Maximum version exists', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(json.data.version).to.exist; });
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Next version uses Vn format', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.a('string').and.match(/^V\d+$/); });
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Version history page exists', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(json.data.dataList).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: 04 Supporting Lookups
